Name: Labor marker deregulation
Comments: works well with big public sector
Text: assign any number of unemplyed workers, if low wages (2C) you may also reassign workers from other companies.

Name: Signing bonus
Text: assign up to 4 unemplyed workers. Get 4V from companies owners

Name: Specialization
Text: get a skilled worker from the supply. Assign up to 3 workers.

Name: Cooperative farm
Text: if you have at least 3 unemployed, build a cooperative farm and assign 3 workers there.

Name: Need for change
Text: propose 2 bills.

Name: Radical reforms
Comments: "dear CC, do X or I will have to propose high Salaries/Tax"
Text: propose a bill. You can move the marker 2 steps but can't call for immediate election.

Name: Fake news
Text: draw 6 cubes, remove up to 4 and return the rest to the bag.

Name: Highlight social issues
Text: buy 3 influance cubes for 15V from State

Name: Interest groups
Text: randomly replace 3 voting cubes of others to your cubes
Players:: Cards that will be seen in a game:

Name: Proletarians of the world, unite!
Text: Add voting cubes equal to your population

Name: Public opinion polling
Text: propoe a bill and reveal 5 cubes, you may then call for imideate vote without spending 1-Influance, if you do use thos 5 cubes, else return to the bag.

Name: Healthcare movement
Text: add 2 cubes to the bag. Propose a bill for Healthcare.

Name: Immigration reform
Text: add 2 cubes to the bag. Propose a bill for immigration.

Name: Student movment
Text: add 2 cubes to the bag. Propose a bill for education.

Name: Workers' movement
Text: add 2 cubes to the bag. Propose a bill for Labor market.

Name: Boost domastic tourism
Text: Buy Luxury from another player up to pop, the State is playing half.

Name: Healthcare benefits
Text: Buy Health from the State up to pop, playing half

Name: State scolership
Text: buy Education from State up to pop, paying half.

Name: Supplemental income program
Text: 1V from State for each emplyed. Then buy good & services

Name: Unemplyed benefits
Text: 5V from State for each unemployed. Then buy goods & services from State

Name: Migration
Comments: might reduce the cost of prosprity actions
Text: if you have at least 4 unemployed, remove up to 2 of them, get 5/10 for unskilled/skilled worker.

Name: Workplace accident
Comments: "dear CC, do X or I will have to take your money"
Text: get 8V from another player for each of their companies of that industry with your workers.

Name: General strike
Text: preform (1+#Trade_unions) strikes

Name: Affordable housing
Text: pay 20/10V to CC/MC to gain 5/3 VP

Name: Public sector overtime
Text:
State pays workers and preforms production with an operational company.  
Buy good & services from State at the type produced by that company.
